biography: Edyll is an Australian actress from Perth, Western Australia. A graduate of the prestigious Western Australian Academy of Performing Arts (WAAPA), she made an early international breakthrough, landing her U.S. television debut as Leyla in NBC's hit series La Brea during her graduating. Since then, Edyll has continued to build a versatile and compelling body of work across film, television, and theatre.
name: Edyll Ismail
